title: AutoBuy DonutSMP
description: The best macros for buying things on DonutSMP.net Market Auto-Buyer 🛒
body:
DonutSMP Market Auto-Buyer is a powerful, fully automated tool (Client-Side Mod) designed for servers with a dynamic market (such as DonutSMP). It allows you to quickly and profitably buy specific items from the auction house (/ah), based on intelligent proportional pricing algorithms.

Thanks to the modern, fully customizable graphical interface, you'll take full control of your in-game finances. Save time, ignore "scam offers," and build your empire automatically!


```
### Warning
```
If you want to buy items, you must enter the price per item, not for the entire stack.
